intro: Protasparagus burchellii, also known as Burchell's asparagus, is a medicinal plant species native to the Western Cape region of South Africa. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The bioactive constituents of Protasparagus burchellii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
